title: Japanese Stir Fry with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
description: A unique and flavorful Japanese-inspired dish featuring sun-dried tomatoes, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the middle eastern stir fry and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the sun-dried tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the creamy and eastern soy sauce.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional sun-dried tomatoes if desired.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
